insight_events.title: Net income down 90%
insight_events.summary: Net income moved -89.7% versus the prior period (3,828.2 to 394.5).
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Verify the filing extract and reconcile the change with the model and prior period.

insight_events.title: Leadership / governance on watch
insight_events.summary: Leadership / governance on watch. Executive sale ($824,405)
insight_events.why_it_matters: May change confidence in management alignment, oversight, or execution.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Check transaction context, trading plans, and whether the pattern is unusual for this issuer.

insight_events.title: Basic EPS down 90%
insight_events.summary: Basic EPS moved -89.7% versus the prior period (17.2 to 1.8).
insight_events.why_it_matters: Negative evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Verify the filing extract and reconcile the change with the model and prior period.

insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (cfo, operating income) are accelerating together — growth moved from +29.5% to +11.0% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

risk_claims.claim: Net income moved -89.7% versus the prior period (3,828.2 to 394.5).
